reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: Two major portions of the document are missing from the output without being marked as intentionally omitted. First, Page 2 (Contents) is entirely absent. Second, a large block of content from Page 23 through Page 40 is missing. This range includes various sections on service delivery for other agencies, cybersecurity initiatives, workforce development, data linking, and awards. While some other pages were noted as omitted for the token budget (Pages 5-13), these specific sections were silently
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 2 contains the 'Contents' table. Pages 23-40 contain sections such as 'Customer Experience for Other Agencies', 'Workforce Development', 'Data Linking', and 'Awards and Recognitions'.
concerns.output_quote: The JSON output skips from Page 1 to Page 3, and from Page 22 ('Emerging Technologies') directly to Page 41 ('NC.gov Delivers a Frictionless Customer and Citizen Digital Experience').
concerns.location: Missing Page 2; Missing range from Page 23 to Page 40.

concerns.analysis: The heading hierarchy in the 'Goals' section is inconsistent and fails to reflect the nesting of the source document. For example, 'Foster a connected North Carolina...' (PDF p. 18) is correctly assigned Level 2. However, its sub-section 'BROADBAND AND DIGITAL INCLUSION' is also assigned Level 2 instead of Level 3. Further, under 'ENHANCE PUBLIC SAFETY' (Level 2), the sub-heading '911 Capabilities' is correctly nested as Level 3, but the subsequent peer sub-heading 'Emerging Technologies' (PDF p
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The section 'Emerging Technologies' on PDF page 22 is a sub-topic of 'ENHANCE PUBLIC SAFETY' (PDF page 21).
concerns.output_quote: The heading 'Emerging Technologies' is set to 'level': 2 (id: emerging-technologies), while its peer '911 Capabilities' is 'level': 3 (id: heading-34).

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: A numerical error was found on Page 21. In the '911 Capabilities' section, the population number served by Next Generation 911 is missing a digit. The source PDF states '10,177,959', whereas the output JSON provides '10,77,959'. This changes the statistic significantly, altering the factual meaning of the report.

Several active links in the source PDF are converted to plain text with underlining in the output, losing their clickable functionality. For example, the legal citation on page 4 and the session law reference on page 19 are rendered as formatted text but lack an 'href' property.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The text 'N.C.G.S. 143B, Article 15' on page 4 is a blue clickable link.
concerns.output_quote: The text is rendered as plain text within a paragraph: 'text': 'N.C.G.S. 143B, Article 15', 'bold': false, 'italic': false, 'underline': true. There is no href element.
